    → 8:24 PM, Oct 25

  • Comic collectors! While we re-factor the Relic Scout app to include more buying tools, the main focus of the site will be content to help collectors (of all types) build a quality collection on a budget. Please subscribe and pass the word! www.relicscout.com

  • Ok, a second watching of Annihilation left a better taste in my mouth. As a movie, it is visually amazing and certainly creepy. As an adaptation of a book I really enjoyed, it took that second viewing to appreciate what it has to offer.

    → 2:41 PM, Oct 15

  • Watched: The Man in the High Castle 📺

    Finished season three this week. So good. Pretty telling most of the negative reviews on Amazon have a theme of homophobia.

    → 12:13 AM, Oct 14

  • Watched: ‎Annihilation (2018) directed by Alex Garland - Letterboxd 🎥

    Feel like I need to watch this again to give it a chance. Spent most of the movie hung up on the differences from the book.

  • Some couch time with Laverne.

    → 9:01 PM, Oct 13

  • What I Can Control

    swissmiss – What I Can Control →

    Absolutely love this… I made and printed out a version of this to display in our house. Good reminders for adults and kids alike.

    What I Can Control:

    1. My Actions & Reactions
    2. My Boundaries
    3. My Expectations
    4. How I Invest My Time
    5. How I Treat Myself
    6. How I Treat Others
    → 10:16 AM, Oct 13

  • Posted a rough draft of a new song. I am liking this one a lot more than my last. Hopefully I can get some more time soon to expand on it.

    → 10:24 PM, Oct 10

  • In Praise of Mediocrity - The New York Times →

    Tim Wu on having hobbies:

    Lost here is the gentle pursuit of a modest competence, the doing of something just because you enjoy it, not because you are good at it.

    → 9:42 PM, Oct 4

  • A few weeks ago I asked if anyone ever deleted their entire Apple Music collection and started over. Well, I just did. Re-booting and adding back with purpose and mindful of the all-you-can-eat world we live in now. Before: 44,000+ songs. Current: 1,486 and a focus on quality.

    → 9:36 AM, Oct 4

  • If the Point of Capitalism is to Escape Capitalism, Then What’s the Point of Capitalism? →

    The capitalist, ironically enough, is trying to earn his freedom from capitalism — just like everyone else. The only difference is that he’s a step closer

    → 8:26 PM, Oct 2

  • Exciting start to the hockey season! Zoey’s team got off to a 2-0 lead and the other team battled back to tie it up and then take the lead with a couple minutes left. Zoey’s team battled hard and scored the tying goal with 48 seconds left. A super fun game to watch.

    → 9:20 PM, Sep 28
